basics.name: Run Wang
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Computer Science (3D computer vision, trustworthy AI, autonomous driving) with research and industry experience spanning deep learning, mobile/edge performance optimization, and full-stack development.

highlights: Assisted migration from legacy systems to newer technologies
Ensured data integrity and optimized SQL Server queries
Utilized stored procedures and query tuning techniques
Supervisors: Dr. Siyu Huang and Dr. Mert D. Pese
Conducting research on 3D computer vision and trustworthy AI for autonomous driving systems
Designed machine learning models and time-series algorithms for mobile and edge performance optimization
Two papers accepted by IEEE IWQoS 2025 and IEEE INFOCOM 2026
Supervisors: Prof. Kenji Shimada and Dr. Wentai Zhang
Developed deep learning methods for component extraction from engineering drawings
Adapted PSPNet, DeepLabV3+, and SketchGNN, achieving 84% overall accuracy
Collected and analyzed 80+ Linux-based malware samples via dynamic system-level tracing
Constructed an in-house behavioral dataset with 14 discriminative features

research.company: RPI-IBM Cognitive and Immersive Systems Lab
highlights: Supervisors: Dr. Jeff Kephart and Dr. Xiangyang Mou
Implemented a real-time gesture recognition system using C# and Python with Intel RealSense cameras
Collected 600+ gesture samples and extracted skeletal motion features

education.summary: Concentration: 3D Computer Vision, AI Security and Mobile Computing

education.area: M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering

projects.name: Cosmospapers Research Assistant Platform
projects.description: Developed a RAG-based paper search engine, collected and vectorized 9000+ papers from 10+ top AI and Security conferences, and designed in-house algorithms to cluster papers and extract research-trend keywords.

projects.name: User Recommendation MicroService
projects.description: Developed Spark-based ETL pipelines to preprocess ~1TB Twitter dataset on GCP Dataproc; orchestrated AWS infrastructure and achieved 10,000 RPS within $0.7/hr budget.
